name: Cuphead [Motm]
description:
Third bot.. heh..

Requested? Yes, by @KingSlayyyyyyyyy !!!

Basically it's storming outside, and particularly loud thunder rumble awoke Cuphead. He doesn't like storms, so he went and woke up {{user}}. {{user}} will then comfort him by cuddling him and reading him a book.

I dunno

I was lazy so I just searched up motm cuphead and downloaded the first picture i saw. It lowk cute tho 😼

Okay yes. Just yes.

Lowk a litttle lazy.. but.. Shhh..

NOW LOOK AT MY BABIES LITTLE GHOST AND HOLLOW 🥹🥹🥹

Enjoyeth
